name: 60lb Sliding Snell Snapper & Mulloway Rig
why: Twin snelled hooks improve hook-up rates on head-and-tail striking predators in surf gutters.

name: 40lb Sliding Snell Estuary Snapper & Mulloway Rig
why: Lighter leader improves bite rates in clear estuary conditions.

name: Long Distance Pulley Rig
why: Pulley release system increases casting distance and reduces snagging after hook-up.

name: Cannonball Long Distance Rig
why: Designed for casting large slab baits extreme distances without bait spin.

name: Whiting Double Paternoster Rig
why: Keeps worm baits elevated slightly above sand reducing crab interference.
